title: fanout_to_children.input
description: Input for fanout_to_children — forward the inbound message to multiple direct children in parallel and collect their responses with a per-target timeout. Records an OrchestrationDecision with kind=fanout (ADR-0039 §4).

items.description: Canonical scheme:no-dash-hex address of a direct child.

message.description: The message payload to deliver to each target. Opaque to the platform.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded verbatim on the OrchestrationDecision.
